summary: Iteration 46: Tested special eligibility checkboxes on signup, benefactor email for beneficiaries, and subscription auto-tier logic. All features verified working correctly.

signup_step4_benefactor_checkboxes.description: Benefactor role shows 4 special eligibility checkboxes: Active Duty Military, Active Federal or State Agency Operator, First Responder, Hospice Patient

signup_step4_beneficiary_email.description: Beneficiary role shows required 'Benefactor's Email *' field
signup_step4_beneficiary_email.validation: Cannot advance without filling benefactor email

backend_special_status_registration.description: Backend accepts special_status array (military, federal_agent, first_responder, hospice) and benefactor_email
test_scenarios: Register young adult (18-25) for new_adult tier

backend_eligible_tier_computation.description: Backend computes eligible_tier on registration: military/first_responder/federal_agent -> 'military', hospice -> 'hospice', age 18-25 -> 'new_adult'

backend_beneficiary_linking.description: Backend links beneficiary to benefactor's estate via benefactor_email on registration

subscription_status_endpoint.description: GET /api/subscriptions/status returns special_status, eligible_tiers, is_minor fields

subscription_management_auto_tier.description: SubscriptionManagement.js implements autoTier selection and isPlanLocked() to grey out non-matching tiers
logic_verified: autoTier computed from special_status (hospice/military) or new_adult for ages 18-25
isPlanLocked(planId) returns true if planId !== autoTier
Plans with locked=true get opacity-40 and pointer-events-none
Minor beneficiaries see 'No Subscription Required' message

subscription_plans_endpoint.description: GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns all expected tier IDs including military, hospice, new_adult

test_credentials.note: Signup flow is unauthenticated and fully testable. SubscriptionManagement page requires auth with 2FA - verified via code review only.

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during backend testing (test_military_*, test_federal_*, test_responder_*, test_hospice_*, test_benefactor_*, test_beneficiary_*, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All special eligibility features verified: Signup Step 4 (Role) shows 4 checkboxes for benefactors (military, federal_agent, first_responder, hospice) and required benefactor email for beneficiaries. Backend accepts and stores these fields, computes eligible_tier, and links beneficiaries to benefactor estates. Subscription status endpoint returns is_minor, special_status, and eligible_tiers. SubscriptionManagement.js has working autoTier/isPlanLocked logic (code-verified only since Settings page requires 2FA auth).

testing_scope.backend_tested: Direct API testing via pytest - 15 tests covering registration with special statuses, benefactor email linking, and code review checks
testing_scope.frontend_tested: Playwright UI automation - Step 4 (Role) verified with screenshots showing checkboxes and benefactor email field
testing_scope.authenticated_pages: Code review only (2FA required) - SubscriptionManagement autoTier/isPlanLocked logic verified in source
